attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have all necessary materials and tools before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should first craft a crafting table using oak planks, then use it to craft a stone pickaxe and an iron pickaxe. After obtaining an iron pickaxe, mine iron ore, smelt it into iron ingots, and finally craft a furnace to smelt coal from coal ore. With these prerequisites met, you can then craft a jukebox. Ensure you do not repeat actions like mining cobblestone without a tool, as this wastes steps.

attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have all required materials before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should craft oak planks first after obtaining an oak log, then use those planks to create a crafting table. After obtaining a crafting table, you can craft other items like sticks and a stone pickaxe in the correct order. Avoid repeating actions like trying to craft sticks multiple times when oak planks are not available. Correct sequence: mine oak log -> craft oak planks -> craft crafting table -> use crafting table to craft sticks and stone pickaxe.
